acceptedAnswer.description: Possibly yes if within course/scope of employment, not pure commute.[9] Depends on details.[9] Key factors: employer-directed trip; job-related; exceptions for special missions.[9] Report fully, gather trip proof, attorney determines coverage.[3] Common gray area.
